scripts.build: npx mintlify export --output .build.zip --disable-openapi && rm -rf out && mkdir out && cd out && unzip -oq ../.build.zip && cd .. && rm .build.zip
scripts.build:full: npm run sync-contracts && npm run build
scripts.prebuild-vercel: npm run build && rm -rf .vercel/output && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && cp -r out/. .vercel/output/static/ && echo '{"version":3,"routes":[]}' > .vercel/output/config.json
